## How verified

<!-- Tests run, manual verification performed. "pytest green" alone is not
     verification for behavior changes — say what you exercised. -->

## Checklist

- [ ] Tests cover the change (red → green for bug fixes)
- [ ] `CHANGELOG.md` updated under **Unreleased** (user-visible changes)
- [ ] `docs/DECISIONS.md` updated if an architecture choice was made
- [ ] Docs/README updated if behavior or commands changed
